title: Improved Create 32x
description: Textures of item, blocks and gui in 32x32 extension for Create
body:
Improved Create 32x is a resource pack that improves the textures for the Create mod. This resource pack increases the texture expansion to 32x32. You can see examples of the textures below.

I recommend using this resource pack with Faithful 32x for the best visual effect, but whatever you use it with, make sure that Improved Create 32x is above all the others in the list for proper functioning.


Not all textures are ready yet, but I plan to update this resource pack to improve those textures that still have not received a 32x32 texture.

 


Credits:
- Faithful 32x: Some textures from this pack were based on textures from Faithful 32x
- Faithful 32x Mods - Some textures that are in this resource pack are taken from here: https://github.com/Faithful-Resource-Pack/Faithful-32x-Mods

You may also be interested in:
Improved Applied Energistics 2 - 32x32 resource pack for Applied Energistics 2
GregTech Revival 32x - 32x32 resource pack for GregTechCEu Modern


Official Faithful Website - https://faithfulpack.net
